title: machine refactor 3: add symlinks for sockets
body:
to avoid errors on macos, we use symlinks to long socket names.

Fixes: #12751
Fixes: #13609

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body:
Stupidly long username:
```
testuserwithreallylongusernamehahahahahahaha@Ashleys-Mini darwin % ./podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
INFO[0000] waiting for clients...                       
ERRO[0000] Error listening on socket: /Users/testuserwithreallylongusernamehahahahahahaha/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/podman-machine-default/podman.sock: listen unix /Users/testuserwithreallylongusernamehahahahahahaha/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/podman-machine-default/podman.sock: bind: invalid argument 
Error: dial unix /var/folders/2j/8l8d892j0fv0rjz_mf0y3y5c0000gp/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock: connect: no such file or directory
```
Long username:
```
slightlyshorterusername@Ashleys-Mini darwin % ./podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
INFO[0000] waiting for clients...                       
ERRO[0000] Error listening on socket: /Users/slightlyshorterusername/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/podman-machine-default/podman.sock: listen unix /Users/slightlyshorterusername/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/podman-machine-default/podman.sock: bind: invalid argument 

Error: dial unix /var/folders/y0/cq7kq5kd29s0yshf5qw0k2d40000gq/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock: connect: no such file or directory
```
Reasonable username:
```
reasonable@Ashleys-Mini darwin % ./podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
INFO[0000] waiting for clients...                       
INFO[0000] new connection from  to /var/folders/pq/tjzq5b_17jx35fjdkk8_6t6h0000gr/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock 
Waiting for VM ...
INFO[0027] Socket forward established: /Users/reasonable/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/podman-machine-default/podman.sock to /run/user/504/podman/podman.sock 
...

Machine "podman-machine-default" started successfully
```
